metadata.name: Provide Product Image Assets to a Retailer

description: A retailer needs high-resolution images of products to use on their own e-commerce website.

nodes.task_description: Receive a request from a retailer for product images.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands which product images are needed.

nodes.task_description: Access the digital asset management (DAM) system to find the approved images.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the high-resolution product photos.

nodes.task_description: Provide the retailer with a link to download the images.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the retailer a secure link to the image files.
